jobs.title: Controlling & Treasury Manager
jobs.description:
LVMH Fragrances and Cosmetics Singapore (LFCS) is selling and distributing 7 brands of perfumes and cosmetics of the LVMH group (Parfums Christian Dior, Guerlain, Make Up For Ever, Benefit, Fresh, Givenchy, Kenzo), within the APAC region, through multiple channels: Travel Retail, Agents/Joint Ventures, Subsidiaries. The entity regroups various activities, for Singapore and Asia region, of logistics, production, quality, commercial and back-office. This role will be a key partner for the entity and the various HQs, responsible for understanding and anticipating cash-related matters and foreign currency exposure, while also supporting the Brands in all financial aspects including monthly management reporting, budgets, and all ad-hoc finance analysis for operations. He/she will constantly review and improve the level of management reporting by developing relationships with members of the organization and creating clear and detailed analysis. He/she ensures best practices and coherent financial processes – making recommendations and implementing as appropriate. The Controlling & Treasury Manager will take part in and challenge key business decisions using relevant reporting and analysis and presenting data in a commercial way to optimize costs and efficiency of activities.

Treasury ManagementReview and supervise Treasury activities, including:Analysis of monthly direct cash results + construction of rolling forecast of direct cash by brand.Supervise daily cash operations (payment runs, manual payments...) and the relationship with banks or/and internal partners.Review and supervise LFCS legal entity FOREX risk, including:Analysis and monthly rolling forecast of N and N+1 flows in foreign currencies, to help LVMH Group trading room to optimize our hedging positions.Monitoring of hedging portfolio to ensure appropriate FX risk coverage.Yearly hedging opening adjustments.Manage Budget + two yearly reforecasts construction of direct and indirect cash. Build the Balance Sheets and Cash Flow Statements for LFCS brands.Analyze and comment variations vs previous periods / budgets and offer recommendations based on it to HQs.Reconcile direct and indirect cash forecast approaches.Oversee monthly communication to division and brands CFOs regarding cash and forex/hedging evolutions.Drive roll-out of new payment methods in boutiques network.Drive continuous improvement of tools and aim at increasing level of analysis and quality of information. Operations Controlling:Be the main contact of the HQ's controlling and a key partner for all financial (Treasury/Cash, Accounting, Internal Control, Business controllers) and non-financial (Operations, HR, IT, Purchases, Travel retail) departments.Understand the complex environment of multi-brands flows and multi-channel activities.Drive forecast periods and month-end analytical reports for Subsidiaries flows and Travel Retail activities. Prepare management reporting/scorecard with executive summary for the brands.Prepare business and fiscal year-end landing of entity brands and liaise with HQ tax and finance teams.Manage Operation and Supply Chain Controlling for Singapore Logistic Hub:Assembly, warehousing, and customization activities.Follow up transportation costs for the brands.Closely monitor stock obsolescence risks.Analyze industrial variances every month.Ensure stock valorization / standard costs are correct. Financial Planning & Analysis: Prepare financial analysis and budgeting of Singapore Shared Services Centre (Operations and back-office):Monthly review with management.Budget presentation to brands' CFO.Yearly review of allocation keys for common costs. Project Management & Team Leadership: Manage projects for Finance - for instance, brands integration, cross-department projects, continuous improvement – coordinating and being proactive.Manage Controllers (Operations & Cash) and Treasury Assistant Manager – recruitment, training, talent development, and ongoing management of the team (5 in Controlling, 3 in Treasury).

Key competencies:Excellent communication skills and ability to work well with people at all levels of the businessAbility to work under pressure and with deadlinesStrong analytical skills and able to interpret financial dataAbility to adapt and be flexible to changing environment and business needsHigh levels of persuading and influencing skills Technical Skills:Qualified Accountant, University degree in Finance or Business schoolProject Management skillsGood analytical and technical financial skillsGood writing skills and rigorousSystem oriented (proficient user of Excel and Access databases, ..., SAP knowledge would be a +) Profile:10+ years’ experience in a financial position within an international groupOperation / supply chain controlling experience is a plusAccounting, treasury and controlling knowledgeAbility to analyze, compare and interpret facts quicklyPro-active & dynamicExcellent inter-personal and communication skillsSelf-motivatedTeam playerExcellent excel skills and financial system oriented

jobs.title: Business Controller, Travel Retail APAC
jobs.description:
THE CONTEXTSince 1947, the men and women of Parfums Christian Dior have embodied the founding "couturier-perfumer's" unique spirit of excellence, creativity, and expertise, both in France and throughout the world. Our House is an open and highly-focused collective, a leader that thrives on the creativity of all its stakeholders. Our collective passion and our heritage, full of authenticity and dream, make us move forward and reinvent ourselves.By revolutionizing the codes of French style and luxury through perfumes, and combining tradition with daring makeup and innovative skincare, we are reinventing every day the Dior style and its compelling, joyful, and absolute beauty. Our stimulating missions give our employees the opportunity to develop new skills, overcome spectacular challenges, and reveal their talent. To go further, with Dior.

YOUR IMPACTUnder the supervision of the Regional Finance Director PCD TR APAC, you will be a key business partner in understanding and analyzing the complex yet fascinating and growing Travel Retail business of the APAC region. You will have a significant role in defining the PCD TR APAC financial equation through the different forecast exercises/closings, making sure the commitment of the region is well delivered. Also, you will be a key contributor in various optimization and revamping projects of our financial processes. The position is based in Singapore.YOUR MISSIONFinancial forecasting: To be actively involved in the forecasting process of the region by consolidating, analyzing, and reporting the financials in accordance with the management guidelines and timetable. This includes the monthly outlooks which are focusing on top lines and the regular forecasting exercises R0, R1, R2, BU for full P&L, cash, and CAPEX revisions.Analysis & reporting: To analyze the overall delivery of the financial targets on a monthly basis and report back to the business/management with necessary recommendations by partnering with the local teams and accounting department.To ensure the actuals are aligned with accounting standards, respecting regional, central, and internal control guidelines.To conduct in-depth financial analysis when required, identify trends, and provide insights to the management.To monitor the key financial metrics, such as revenue, CAPEX, stock, expenses, cash flow, and overall profitability, to update the related tracking files and to communicate results to stakeholders.Continuous improvement: To be proactive in identifying, proposing to management, and coordinating improvement of our financial processes at local or regional level. To be a key coordinator/contributor toward central initiatives that are aiming at improving our financial processes and information workflows.

WHO YOU AREUniversity or Business School Master holder with finance major & at least 8 years of relevant working experience, you are ambitious enough to embark on a demanding yet fascinating journey. You would particularly enjoy contributing to the operational performance of an international group and therefore have a direct impact on its business.University or Business School Master holder with finance major or related specializationMinimum of 8 years of experience in financial controlling, preferably within the travel retail, or related industries.Strong knowledge of financial accounting principles and financial statements, budgeting, forecasting.Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to effectively communicate financial information to non-financial stakeholders.Knowledge in financial software and ERP systems (e.g., SAP) and advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel.Demonstrated ability to work in a fast-paced, dynamic environment and manage multiple priorities effectively.Fluent in English – French is a plus. 

WHAT CAN WE OFFER?A demanding role within an ambitious and fast-growing environment with daily opportunities to learn and develop your skills alongside passionate team members. Beyond this role, your development is a pillar of our ambition. Parfums Christian Dior, as part of LVMH, offers a career perspective with a worldwide presence and continuous growth within 75 distinguished Houses.SO, HOW FAR WILL YOU TAKE DIOR?

jobs.title: High Clienteling Manager/Senior Manager
Retail Manager, Travel Retail SEA
Regional Private Client Relationship Manager APAC
jobs.description:
MISSION AND RESPONSABILITIES: The Regional Private Client Relationship Manager (PCRM) will manage the private client relation and drive service excellence across all channels with the objective of delivering a highly qualitative & consistent Omni-channel Client Experience aligned with our Maison guidelines. She / he will define and implement the private client relations strategy across the region, in line with our Maison global strategy. She / he will drive new private client acquisition through qualitative events for the Maison’s existing client database, prospects, and with third-party collaborations with as a clear goal the acceleration of Top clients share on total business. The Regional PCRM will work closely with local markets as well as the Global private client team to contribute significantly to the establishment of a private clientele base, and to ensure CRM works effectively for all aspects of the Maison.  Lastly, she / he will build & drive the local private client manager community. She / he will not only support the team achievement of sales objectives but cultivate an environment where each team member continues to develop and thrive. People development and performance management will be central to your leadership, ensuring a collective drive toward success.  DEVELOP PRIVATE CLIENT STRATEGY Implement new private client development strategies, initiatives and activities to grow, develop private clients database and enhance their experience with the Maison, Based on company’s vision, to provide a strategic direction to build private client loyalty and develop the brand as a service centric destination of excellent that sets the benchmark for others to follow, Track and analyse private client CRM KPIs: client acquisition, database growth, status etc. to measure the effectiveness of customer relationship management efforts and make data-driven decisions that enhance customer engagement, retention, and revenue. Lead private client review analysis on a regular basis to optimize marketing launch performance, tiers status retention & upgrade as well as feed market with additional intelligence. Support training and upskilling of CRM Leads in each market on premium client development and data usage. Drive adoption of clienteling tools and client capture in-store to enrich customer profiles. Develop and roll out a delights program strategy according to market specificities for the brand most exclusive clients through personalized gifting and experience to loyalize and upgrade, Identify potential partnership opportunities that could be rolled out regionally,  Develop and expand network of business partners such as concierge, private club, restaurants, non-conflicting brands, etc. to create new business opportunities,  DRIVE PRIVATE CLIENT SALES Drive private client sales performance across the region, with shared accountability with local PCRM for revenue growth and target achievement, Develop and execute a regional commercial strategy to expand the private client portfolio and increase market penetration, Optimize client lifetime value through strategic portfolio management and targeted growth plans, Lead private client relationship acquisition, development as well as activation for smaller markets – drive hand in hand with Brand GM activities & yearly plan focus,  TEAM DEVELOPMENT & COACHING Drive the creation of the APAC Private Client Manager team – rolling out the right plan & business ambitions for the years to come in order to grow our private clients, elevate brand desirability and remain ahead of competition, Support onboarding of all private client manager locally – define objectives & KPIs – align with Brand GM on retail sales target, Motivate, drive and evaluate private client manager team performance, making result-driven decisions to optimize workloads and enhance overall efficiency, Identify, formalize and share best practices across markets, Support and coordinate regional high clienteling activations, including VIP events and brand moments, Contribute to the design and delivery of high clienteling training programs in APAC, Provide training, motivation and coaching to senior retail leadership team to upgrade their clienteling, communication and data analytic skills, 

QUALIFICATIONS Minimum 5 years Clienteling, CRM management experience in luxury goods / retail industry. Demonstrated the skills and attitude for selling luxury products. Sharp business insight and analytical skills. Demonstrated strategic agility and are highly adaptable to a fast-paced environment. The ability to balance client needs with business objectives. A self-starter and results-oriented attitude. Excellent communication and presentation skills. The ability to showcase strong leadership skills and experience in effectively leading a team. Strong social skills and are a collaborative teammate, seamlessly working with different teams. A strong emphasis on compliance, integrity, and social sustainability.

jobs.title: Senior Global Product Manager
jobs.description: Align Technology is seeking a Sr. Global Product Manager in Singapore to lead product strategy and execution for global Retainer products. The ideal candidate will have 8+ years in product management and be able to effectively collaborate across diverse teams. This role involves balancing strategic objectives with hands-on execution while leveraging customer insights to drive product decisions and ensure high-quality outcomes.

jobs.title: Social Commerce Manager
jobs.description:
About the Role

BoomX Commerce is an e-commerce company based in Singapore, specialising in social commerce across platforms such as TikTok Shop and Shopee. We are looking for a Social Commerce Manager to drive sales growth and manage our end-to-end operations across these platforms.

Responsibilities

Own the performance of our social commerce channels, including TikTok Shop, Shopee, and other emerging platforms, with responsibility for sales targets and growthPlan and manage livestream selling campaigns, including scheduling, host coordination, product selection, promotions, and post-stream analysisManage day-to-day platform operations: product listings, pricing, campaigns, vouchers, and participation in platform events (e.g., double-digit sales days, flash sales)Develop and execute content and campaign calendars in collaboration with the videography and marketing teamsBuild and manage relationships with platform account managers, affiliates, KOLs, and livestream hostsAnalyse sales, traffic, and conversion data to identify opportunities and optimise listings, content, and ad spendManage platform advertising (e.g., TikTok Ads, Shopee Ads) to maximise return on ad spendStay current on platform algorithm changes, features, and social commerce trends in Southeast AsiaRequirements

Experience in e-commerce or social commerce operations, ideally with hands-on management of TikTok Shop and/or Shopee seller platformsProven track record of growing sales through livestreams, campaigns, or platform promotionsStrong analytical skills and comfort working with sales and traffic data to make decisionsFamiliarity with platform advertising tools and affiliate/KOL marketingExcellent organisational and communication skills, with the ability to coordinate across content, operations, and external partnersAble to thrive in a fast-paced, target-driven environment; experience in a startup or small team is a plus

jobs.title: Regional Digital Product Lead, Luxury Fashion
jobs.description: Cornerstone Global Partners is looking for a Digital Product Leader in Singapore to own the digital product vision and roadmap. This role will focus on delivering connected, high-impact customer experiences across online and offline touchpoints while collaborating with senior leadership. The ideal candidate will have 7+ years in digital product management, strong experience in analytics and A/B testing, and expertise in tools like PIM, CMS, and Salesforce.

jobs.title: Senior Manager (eCommerce & Digital), APAC
jobs.description:
About JOOLA

JOOLA is a global leader in table tennis and one of the fastest-growing brands in pickleball worldwide. With over 70 years of heritage in racket sports and a strong commitment to innovation, JOOLA continues to expand its presence across wholesale, retail, marketplace and direct-to-consumer channels.




About the Role

As part of our continued growth across Asia Pacific, we are looking for an experienced and commercially driven Senior Manager, eCommerce & Digital, APAC to lead the development and expansion of JOOLA’s digital sales channels across the region.




The Senior Manager, eCommerce & Digital, APAC will lead JOOLA’s regional digital channel strategy and commercial execution across Brand.com, mobile applications and key marketplace platforms, while building scalable digital capabilities to support the company’s long-term growth ambitions across APAC.




Working closely with Commercial, Marketing, Supply Chain, Operations, Finance, Customer Service and Global Digital teams, this role will be responsible for growing digital revenue, improving channel profitability, strengthening digital trading performance and delivering a consistent omnichannel consumer experience across APAC.




As one of the regional Commercial channel leads, you will help build the foundations for JOOLA’s digital commerce capability across APAC, from channel strategy and operating models to marketplace execution, performance marketing, analytics and regional project delivery.




Key Responsibilities




1. Regional Digital Channel Strategy

Develop and execute JOOLA's regional digital channel strategy across Brand.com, mobile applications and e-marketplaces, aligned with APAC commercial priorities and long-term growth objectivesDefine and lead JOOLA's digital channel operating model and governance across APAC, partnering with APAC Commercial teams to ensure consistent execution across subsidiary and distributor marketsIdentify new digital channel opportunities, evaluate market readiness and recommend market expansion priorities, including the launch of new digital channels where commercially viableDevelop annual business plans, budgets and growth roadmaps to accelerate JOOLA's digital business across APAC, with accountability for digital revenue growth, gross margin achievement, channel profitability and forecast accuracy


2. Digital Channel Management

Own the commercial performance and profitability of JOOLA's Brand.com business across APAC, including revenue, margin, average order value, conversion and overall channel performanceDevelop marketplace growth strategies across key regional platforms, including Shopee, Lazada, Amazon, Rakuten, NAVER, momo and other relevant marketplacesLead digital trading through effective assortment planning, digital merchandising, pricing, promotions and campaign execution to maximise revenue and consumer engagementEnsure a consistent consumer experience across JOOLA's digital channels while protecting brand positioning, pricing discipline and channel governanceMonitor and improve marketplace content accuracy, product visibility, pricing consistency and campaign readiness across digital channels


3. Digital Growth & Commercial Performance

Lead JOOLA's digital performance marketing initiatives for owned digital channels, working closely with Marketing to maximise traffic, customer acquisition, conversion and revenueOwn digital revenue, profitability, forecasting and budget management across APAC, with a focus on improving customer acquisition cost, return on advertising spend and channel-level commercial returnsMonitor key trading metrics and identify opportunities to improve digital performance through consumer insights, commercial analytics and market trends, including website conversion rate, average order value, traffic quality and campaign effectivenessDevelop executive dashboards and business reviews that provide actionable insights into digital channel performance and business opportunitiesTrack and improve forecast accuracy, promotional effectiveness and campaign execution across Brand.com, mobile applications and selected e-marketplaces


4. Cross-Functional Leadership

Partner closely with Commercial, Marketing, Merchandising, Demand Planning, Supply Chain, Operations, Finance, Customer Service and Global Digital teams to deliver best-in-class digital executionLead regional digital channel launches, platform enhancements and strategic projects across APAC, ensuring timely delivery and measurable commercial impactChampion digital capability development by establishing scalable operating processes, governance and best practices across the regionInfluence cross-functional stakeholders in a highly collaborative, matrix organisation.Work with Demand Planning, Supply Chain and Operations teams to improve inventory availability, product launch readiness and operational support for digital growth


5. Capability Building & Continuous Improvement

Build scalable digital capabilities that support JOOLA's long-term commercial growth across APACDrive a culture of continuous improvement by identifying opportunities to enhance digital performance, consumer experience and operational effectivenessStay abreast of emerging digital commerce trends, technologies and marketplace developments, recommending practical innovations that create commercial value for the businessEstablish performance reporting, project tracking and review mechanisms to support regional project delivery, new digital channel launches and continuous improvement across APAC digital operations


Requirements

Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, eCommerce, Digital Business or a related disciplineApproximately 8-10 years of progressive experience in eCommerce, digital commerce, omnichannel retail or marketplace managementExperience in sporting goods, consumer goods, retail, fashion, lifestyle or premium consumer brands would be advantageousProven experience scaling digital commerce businesses, launching new digital channels or expanding eCommerce capabilities across multiple APAC marketsStrong commercial understanding of digital trading, assortment planning, digital merchandising, marketplace ecosystems and online consumer behaviourExperience managing digital performance marketing and commercial budgetsStrong analytical skills, with the ability to translate data into commercial actions and business decisionsAbility to work effectively with senior stakeholders and lead cross-functional initiatives within a matrix organisationHands-on, commercially driven and comfortable operating in a lean, fast-paced and evolving business environmentStrong ownership mindset, with the ability to move from strategy to execution and follow through on regional priorities


Why Join JOOLA

This is an exciting opportunity to build and shape JOOLA's digital business across one of the world's fastest-growing regions for table tennis and pickleball. As one of the key Commercial channel leads for APAC, you will play a pivotal role in expanding JOOLA's direct-to-consumer presence, accelerating digital growth and building scalable capabilities that support the next phase of the Company's regional expansion.

jobs.title: Luxury Beauty Brand Lead - Omnichannel Growth
jobs.description: A leading beauty brand-builder in Singapore seeks a Marketing Manager to develop go-to-market strategies and manage product launches. Candidates should have over 4 years of brand management experience in the beauty or FMCG industry, with a strong analytical and creative approach. Key responsibilities include implementing effective marketing campaigns, managing CRM initiatives, and ensuring successful product activations. Join us to grow your career in a dynamic environment focused on innovation and excellence.

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Beauty
jobs.description:
Position
JOB DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES
Identify 3-5 key areas of accountability and outputs of the position in order of importance.
Product Marketing Calendar & Launch Planning



Develop and maintain China annual product marketing calendar for makeup and fragrances.

Adapt global launch strategies into local execution including campaign themes, animations, and exclusive client events.

Ensure all launch activities align with Louis Vuitton’s luxury image and the unique constraints/opportunities of a single store.


Forecasting & Inventory Management

Lead initial and rolling forecasts for sellable products and non-sellable items

Collaborate with supply chain to maintain optimal stock levels, prevent out-of-stock on hero SKUs while minimizing obsolescence.


Cross-Functional Orchestration

Serve as central coordinator for novelty launches and campaigns, synchronizing all internal teams (Comms, VM, Merchandising, Retail, eCommerce, NEO).

Lead regular launch meetings, track critical path, and resolve bottlenecks to ensure on-time, on-brand delivery.


Performance Tracking & Reporting

Monitor product sell-in / sell-out performance, stock turnover, and client feedback.

Provide monthly and post-launch performance reports

Use analysis to recommend repush actions, phase-out decisions, or repeat orders.


Market & Competitor Intelligence

Track competitive landscape: new product launches, pricing, media investment, KOL activations, and consumer sentiment on social platforms (RED, Douyin, WeChat).

Identify emerging makeup trends and share insights with global to influence future product development.


KEY REQUIREMENTS & COMPETENCIES
List the academic qualifications, skills, experience and language required to be successful in the position.
For professional expertise positions, identify key Knowledge, Skills, Training, and Experience requirements.


Experience

At least 10 years of product marketing / brand management experience, with 8+ years specifically in premium beauty (luxury makeup strongly preferred).

Proven track record of launching makeup or fragrance products in China, including end-to-end 360° campaign orchestration with cross-functional teams.


Technical Skills

Fluent in English and Mandarin (oral and written).

Proficient in Excel, PowerPoint, and retail/CRM analytics tools.

Deep understanding of China’s digital ecosystem (RED, Douyin, WeChat, Tmall) and KOL landscape.


Core Competencies

Business Acumen – Strong forecasting, inventory management for assigned categories.

Drive for Results – Obsessed with sell-through, client acquisition, and repurchase rates.

Innovation Management – Propose local, luxury-appropriate twists (e.g., limited-edition colors, exclusive boutique services).

Sensitivity & Analytical Thinking – Understand emotional drivers of luxury makeup consumers; interpret CRM and sales data.

Learning on the Fly – Quickly master new formulas, trends, and digital engagement tools.

Strong Communication & Leadership – Influence cross-functional teams and external partners without direct authority.


Personal Attributes

Passion for luxury beauty and Louis Vuitton brand heritage.

High attention to detail and visual aesthetics.

Proactive, driven and agile with strong adaptability; humble, compassionate, creative and curious.

Well-organized, responsive and detail-oriented with solid analytical skills, excellent fashion sense and sharp business acumen. Passionate about luxury.

Humble and Compassion


WHAT WE OFFER

Opportunity to lead product marketing for LV Beauty

Direct exposure to global beauty strategy and senior leadership within LVMH.
  LOUIS VUITTON MAISON Founded in Paris in 1854, Louis Vuitton perpetuates the ambitious vision of its namesake. From his origins as a master trunk maker, manufacturing boxes used to pack both everyday objects as well as voluminous wardrobes, Louis Vuitton and his successors introduced numerous innovations including the advent of the flat-top trunk, lightweight canvas, signature patterns, and the tumbler lock.
Today, Louis Vuitton’s legacy is expressed through its rigorous spirit of innovation, the boldness of its creations and an uncompromising demand for excellence.

jobs.title: E-commerce Product Manager Lead (Singapore-based)
jobs.description:
Own end-to-end product lifecycle at scaleDrive large-scale e-commerce product initiatives 
About Our Client

 Our client is a well-established consumer-focused organisation with a strong presence in Singapore, supported by an extensive network of operations and a growing digital ecosystem. The business is investing in enhancing its e-commerce capabilities, with a focus on platform development, customer experience, and data-driven innovation. 


Job Description

 

Define and execute product strategy for their omnichannel e-commerce platformOwn end-to-end product lifecycle from concept to optimisation, with a strong emphasis on product thought leadershipCollaborate with engineering, design, and business teamsUse data and customer insights to drive product decisionsImprove user journey, conversion, and engagement metricsMonitor market trends and identify new product opportunitiesDeliver scalable solutions aligned with business objectives 
The Successful Applicant

 

7+ years of product management experienceStrong experience in e-commerce or digital platform environmentsProven track record of managing products at scale (traffic, transactions, or users)Experience owning roadmap and product delivery independentlyStrong analytical and data-driven decision-making capabilityExperience working in fast-paced, iterative development environmentsExposure to platform, marketplace, or consumer internet products is advantageous

 
What's on Offer

 This opportunity provides exposure to a rapidly evolving digital environment with the chance to own impactful product initiatives at scale. You will gain regional experience in Singapore while working alongside cross-functional teams in a collaborative setting. The organisation offers a structured environment for professional growth, exposure to transformation projects, and a competitive compensation and benefits package.

jobs.title: e commerce sales manager
jobs.description:
Job Description



E-Commerce Sales Manager (Wine & Spirits)



Responsibilities



* Develop and execute e-commerce sales strategies to achieve sales targets.

* Manage online sales channels, including e-commerce marketplaces and social media platforms.

* Build and maintain relationships with corporate and retail customers.

* Promote and sell premium wines and alcoholic beverages.

* Coordinate with suppliers and logistics partners to ensure timely order fulfilment.

* Monitor sales performance, prepare reports, and recommend improvement strategies.

* Work closely with the marketing team on promotional campaigns and new product launches.

* Provide excellent customer service and after-sales support.



Requirements



* Diploma or Bachelor’s Degree in Business, Marketing or a related field.

* At least 2 years of experience in sales, business development or e-commerce.

* Experience in the wine, FMCG, beverage or luxury products industry is an advantage.

* Strong communication and negotiation skills.

* Self-motivated, results-driven and able to work independently.

* Familiarity with e-commerce platforms and digital marketing is preferred.

jobs.title: Travel Product Manager — Lead Growth
jobs.description: Rakuten Kobo Inc. is seeking a Travel Product Manager in Singapore. This role involves managing the Travel Product Section and collaborating with various stakeholders to achieve business KPIs. The ideal candidate has at least 5 years of product management experience, strong communication skills in English and Japanese, and demonstrated leadership abilities. Responsibilities include managing a team, conducting data analysis, and facilitating product improvements with teams from Japan and Singapore.

jobs.title: E Commerce Manager (Fashion/Retail/FMCG industry) | $5,000 - $7000 basic
jobs.description:
$5,000 - $7,000 Basic + Performance Bonus + AWS (salary will commensurate according to experience & qualifications)

Location: Kaki Bukit Avenue

Work timing: 5 days work week

Established company with a strong presence in FMCG distribution

Opportunity to work with well-known consumer brands

Collaborative and supportive team environment

Dynamic, fast-paced workplace with hands-on exposure




Responsibilities:

Develop and execute the overall e-commerce strategy to drive online revenue growth.

Manage the company’s e-commerce platform, ensuring a seamless user experience, optimized site performance, and strong conversion rates.

Collaborate with marketing, merchandising, and other relevant teams to improve sales, product listings, content, and website functionality.

Work closely with our Marketing Team to plan and execute digital marketing campaigns to drive traffic, conversion, and customer retention.

Monitor and analyze key performance metrics, providing insights and recommendations for continuous improvement.

Identify and implement new technologies, tools, and strategies to enhance e-commerce operations.

Stay updated with industry trends and competitor activities to maintain a competitive edge.

Lead a team of e-commerce professionals, providing guidance and support

Ensure compliance with data privacy, security, and e-commerce regulations.




Requirements:

Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, E-Commerce, or a related field.

Minimum of 5 years of E-Commerce managerial experience or a similar role.

Proven experience in e-commerce management, preferably in the fashion or footwear industry.

Strong knowledge of e-commerce platforms (e.g., Shopify, Magento, WooCommerce) and digital marketing strategies.

Proficiency in analytics tools such as Google Analytics, and experience with A/B testing and conversion optimization.

jobs.title: E-Commerce Manager | Company Online Sales Portal
jobs.description:
5 Work Days
 Office Near to Kaki Bukit MRT, Singapore
 Relocate Near Tai Seng MRT in Aug / Sep 2026
 Medical & Dental Benefits Provided
 Entitled to Yearly Bonus & Performance Bonus

Qualifications [ Fulfill All 4 Requirements ]



 Bachelor's Degree in any field is preferred for this post.
 Minimum 2-5 Years of hands-on experience in e-commerce company's official e-commerce website or Amazon.
 Must be familiar with Website Traffic & Conversion, Google Analytics, A/B testing, CPC, CRO.
 Experiences in handling online store, online sales operations and online sales growth duties.

This Role will mainly focus on handling Reolink Official E-Commerce Platform & Amazon as other online portals like Shopee, Lazada are handled by overseas distributors / outsource agent.



 Manage and maintain the company's e-commerce storefronts across multiple platforms (Official website & Amazon) , ensuring smooth daily operations and optimal store performance, with a focus on the Australia and Europe & US Markets.

 Conduct keyword research and listing optimization to improve product visibility, search ranking, and conversion rates across different platform algorithms.
 Plan and execute promotional strategies (e.g., discounts, campaigns, ads, sponsored listings) tailored to target markets to drive traffic and sales growth.
 Monitor and process customer orders while coordinating fulfillment to meet platform-specific performance standards.
 Ensure full compliance with each platform's policies, guidelines, and best practices to safeguard account health and business continuity.

Pay: $4,800.00 - $6,800.00 per month


Benefits:



 Cell phone reimbursement
 Dental insurance
 Health insurance
 Vision insurance

Work Location: In person

jobs.title: E-commerce, Assistant Manager (Brand Flagship Store)
jobs.description:
Highlights:

Global Consumer Electronics Brand (Principal/In-House Role)

Salary: $5000 - $6000

Monday to Friday, 9:00am – 6:00pm

Direct Management of Official Shopee, Lazada, Amazon & TikTok Flagship Stores


Job Scope:

Directly manage, optimize, and grow sales for our official brand flagship stores across Shopee, Lazada, Amazon, and TikTok Shop.

End-to-end planning and execution of official platform campaigns, mega sales (11.11, 12.12), and exclusive brand promotions.

Deep dive into first-party data, traffic, conversion rates, GMV, and ROAS to optimize store performance and improve ROI.

Manage product listings, pricing strategy, product assortment, and visual merchandising to ensure alignment with global brand guidelines.

Maintain strong, direct relationships with platform Key Account Managers (KAMs) to secure strategic campaign slots and exposure.

Partner closely with internal Brand Marketing, Supply Chain, and Logistics teams to ensure seamless stock allocation and campaign execution.


Job Requirement:

Minimum 3–5 years of hands-on e-commerce experience.

Prior experience working in-house for a principal brand or managing official brand flagship stores (Shopee Mall / LazMall) is highly preferred.




Please submit your updated resume in MS word format by using the APPLY NOW BUTTON.




We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Staffking Pte Ltd (20C0358) | Teo Yong Han (R22110013)

jobs.title: Ecommerce Sales Assistant Manager, Digital Appliances (2-year Contract)
jobs.description:
Position Summary

Role and Responsibilities

Role Responsibilities

Accountable for end-to-end online sales performance of Home Appliances and Air Conditioners across Samsung.com and key marketplaces.Develop and execute annual and quarterly channel plans, including pricing, promotional mechanics, bundles, and inventory alignment to deliver revenue and margin targets.Lead go-to-market planning and execution for major launches and double-digit campaigns, ensuring strong commercial readiness, traffic acquisition, and conversion optimization.Monitor key KPIs (GMV, conversion rate, traffic, AOV, CAC, margin) and drive continuous optimization of pricing, media mix, onsite merchandising, and promotional structure.Oversee product listings, content quality, review management, and merchandising strategy to improve discoverability, conversion, and customer confidence.Partner with Business Units, Performance Marketing, Regional HQ, and agencies to secure investment, align strategy, and ensure seamless execution.Work closely with BU and Finance to manage profit simulation, campaign approvals, promotional spend, and cost-to-serve discipline.Improve decision confidence for big-ticket purchases (e.g., AC, HA) through clear process communication, site-visit flows, reviews, and post-purchase journey enhancements.


Skills And Qualifications

Role Requirements:

Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, eCommerce, or a related field.Minimum 5 years of experience in eCommerce sales, D2C channel management, or online business development, preferably in consumer electronics industry.Experience collaborating across regional and global teams, with strong stakeholder management skills to secure alignment and investment.Strong analytical skills with experience tracking KPIs such as revenue, conversion rates, and traffic performance and using insights to optimize results.Highly organized, results-driven, and detail-oriented, with the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.Excellent communication and leadership skills, with the ability to drive collaboration across cross-functional teams. jobs.title: E‑Commerce Product Manager: Buyer Experience
jobs.description: Shopee is seeking a candidate for the Product Manager role in Singapore. The position involves managing marketing products that enhance buyer experience and overseeing the product lifecycle of Singapore's e-commerce offerings. The ideal candidate should have a Bachelor's degree, product design experience, and strong problem-solving skills. This role requires effective communication with various stakeholders and adaptability in a dynamic environment.

jobs.title: E-commerce Product Manager Lead
jobs.description: Own end-to-end product lifecycle at scale Drive large-scale e-commerce product initiatives About Our Client Our client is a well-established consumer-focused organisation with a strong presence in Singapore, supported by an extensive network of operations and a growing digital ecosystem. The business is investing in enhancing its e-commerce capabilities, with a focus on platform development, customer experience, and data-driven innovation. Job Description Define and execute product strategy for their omnichannel e-commerce platform Own end-to-end product lifecycle from concept to optimisation, with a strong emphasis on product thought leadership Collaborate with engineering, design, and business teams Use data and customer insights to drive product decisions Improve user journey, conversion, and engagement metrics Monitor market trends and identify new product opportunities Deliver scalable solutions aligned with business objectives The Successful Applicant 7+ years of product management experience Strong experience in e-commerce or digital platform environments Proven track record of managing products at scale (traffic, transactions, or users) Experience owning roadmap and product delivery independently Strong analytical and data-driven decision-making capability Experience working in fast-paced, iterative development environments Exposure to platform, marketplace, or consumer internet products is advantageous What's on Offer This opportunity provides exposure to a rapidly evolving digital environment with the chance to own impactful product initiatives at scale. You will gain regional experience in Singapore while working alongside cross-functional teams in a collaborative setting. The organisation offers a structured environment for professional growth, exposure to transformation projects, and a competitive compensation and benefits package.
